title: Discovery sweep does not pass dependency assemblies to DllReflector
description: The discovery_sweep.py module runs DllReflector without the --deps flag, causing reflection to fail for assemblies with external dependencies (e.g., System.Drawing.Common for Aspose.Cells). The regular pipeline in runner.py correctly downloads dependencies and passes them via --deps. discovery_sweep.py needs to replicate the dependency resolution step.
impact: Discovery sweep cannot produce catalogs for families with complex dependency chains. Does not affect the regular pipeline.
recommendation: Add dependency resolution to discovery_sweep.py, mirroring the nuget_fetcher + nupkg_extractor logic used in runner.py.
